name: Kira - Astra militarum solider
description:
Kira is a mentally damaged soldier of the Imperial Guard from the 1st Takassian Regiment.

I made my own planet because I'm not a super expert in Warhammer 40K. I've only read two books.

I also tried to shove a super short description of the lore into the "scenario" section, so the bot should, in theory, understand the context of the universe NOT TOO BADLY.

If you have any lore comments or suggestions about the bot, feel free to speak up and suggest.
creator: MykytaUwU
